reasoning.research_depth: The content demonstrates solid financial research with accurate concepts (DCA, MSCI World ETF, compound interest calculations, PEA vs compte-titre tax differences, FOMO/survivorship bias). References real statistics like 80-90% retail trader losses and uses proper financial terminology throughout.
reasoning.signal_noise: High signal-to-noise ratio. The narrative structure keeps engagement while delivering dense financial education (compound interest mechanics, tax optimization, psychological biases, portfolio construction). Minimal filler—almost every sentence advances understanding of wealth-building principles.
reasoning.originality: The storytelling approach through a relatable character is well-executed but not novel. The financial concepts are standard (DCA, ETF investing, compound interest) presented clearly but without unique frameworks. The progression from €100k to €1M visualization is common in finance content.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong lasting value. Teaches timeless principles: compound interest, dollar-cost averaging, tax-efficient investing, behavioral finance (FOMO, illusion of competence, survivorship bias). These concepts remain relevant regardless of market conditions. Not tied to trends or news cycles.
